initial_candidates.sql:
SELECT 
  COUNT(CASE WHEN atom.element = 'Cl' THEN 1 END) AS cl_count,
  COUNT(CASE WHEN atom.element = 'C' THEN 1 END) AS c_count
FROM bond
JOIN connected ON bond.bond_id = connected.bond_id
JOIN atom ON (connected.atom_id = atom.atom_id OR connected.atom_id2 = atom.atom_id)
WHERE bond.bond_id = 'TR001_1_8'
GROUP BY bond.molecule_id;
